productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Solid Grey Shirts
description: Composition Reversible full sleeves shirt made of a cotton and polyester blend, grey on one side and charcoal on the other, with a full length buttoned placket Fitting Regular Wash care Machine/hand wash in cold water at 30 C with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron Get ready to party in style! indigo nation gives you two shirts rolled into one; wear the jazzy grey side for one party, and the shiny charcoal side for the other. You couldn't have asked for a better bargain! Pair it with formal trousers or denims and rock the world! Model statistics The model wears size 40 in shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
